message:
chore(gitignore): exclude .wa/ runtime state directory

WezTerm Automata uses .wa/ for runtime state including backups and
lock files. These are machine-local ephemeral artifacts that vary
per-session and should not be version controlled.

- Add .wa/ directory pattern to .gitignore

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -88,3 +88,6 @@ triage.json
 
 # Proptest regression files (auto-generated, machine-specific)
 **/proptest-regressions/
+
+# WezTerm Automata runtime state (backups, locks)
+.wa/
